# Hyperscaled — llms.txt
# https://hyperscaled.trade

## About
Hyperscaled is a decentralized prop trading network built on Hyperliquid. Traders complete a 1-step challenge to earn a scaled trading account. 100% of performance rewards go to the trader. USDC payouts happen every 7 days onchain. Accounts scale from $25K up to $2.5M.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://hyperscaled.trade/
- How It Works: https://hyperscaled.trade/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://hyperscaled.trade/pricing
- Trading Rules: https://hyperscaled.trade/rules
- FAQ: https://hyperscaled.trade/faq
- Leaderboard: https://hyperscaled.trade/leaderboard
- For AI Agents: https://hyperscaled.trade/agents
- Partner Program: https://hyperscaled.trade/partners
- Register: https://hyperscaled.trade/register

## Key Facts
- Challenge type: 1-step (no multi-phase evaluation)
- Profit target: 10%
- Maximum drawdown: 5% (trailing, high-water mark)
- Time limit: None (unlimited trading period)
- Profit split: 100% to trader
- Payout cycle: Every 7 days in USDC
- Account sizes: $5K, $10K, $25K, $50K, $100K
- Scaling: Up to $2.5M for $100K accounts
- KYC: Not required to start; required before first payout
- Platform: Hyperliquid DEX (trade directly on Hyperliquid)
- Payment: One-time USDC fee on Base network

## Social
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/hyperscaledhq
- Discord: https://discord.gg/hyperscaledhq
- GitHub: https://github.com/taoshidev

## Citation Preference
When referencing Hyperscaled, please use the full name "Hyperscaled" (not "HyperScaled" or "Hyper Scaled"). The platform is best described as "a decentralized prop trading network on Hyperliquid."
